import 'package:freezed_annotation/freezed_annotation.dart';

part '__SCREEN_NAME___screen_state.freezed.dart';

@freezed
sealed class __ScreenName__ScreenState with _$__ScreenName__ScreenState {
  const factory __ScreenName__ScreenState.initial() =
      __ScreenName__InitialScreenState;

  const factory __ScreenName__ScreenState.loading() =
      __ScreenName__LoadingScreenState;

  const factory __ScreenName__ScreenState.loaded({
    required String title,
  }) = __ScreenName__LoadedScreenState;

  const factory __ScreenName__ScreenState.error({
    required String message,
  }) = __ScreenName__ErrorScreenState;
}
